properties.select_statement: SELECT customer_id, first_name, last_name, email, signup_date, country FROM iceberg_data.datastage_demo_bronze_v2.bronze_customers WHERE email IS NOT NULL

SELECT cast(order_id as integer) order_id, cast(customer_id as integer) customer_id, cast(order_ts as timestamp) order_ts, cast(cast(order_ts as timestamp) as date) order_date, status, payment_method FROM iceberg_data.datastage_demo_bronze_v2.bronze_orders WHERE order_id IS NOT NULL

SELECT cast(order_item_id as integer) order_item_id, cast(order_id as integer) order_id, cast(product_id as integer) product_id, cast(quantity as integer) quantity, cast(discount_pct as decimal(5,2)) discount_pct FROM iceberg_data.datastage_demo_bronze_v2.bronze_order_items WHERE quantity > 0

SELECT cast(product_id as integer) product_id, product_name, category, cast(unit_price as decimal(12,2)) unit_price FROM iceberg_data.datastage_demo_bronze_v2.bronze_products WHERE product_id IS NOT NULL
